mod-spectrum-contextual-help-minimum-wid.description: Used by `.spectrum-ContextualHelp`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-contextual-help-minimum-width)`, if not set.

mod-spectrum-contextual-help-padding.description: Used by `.spectrum-ContextualHelp-popover`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-spacing-400)`, if not set.

mod-spectrum-contextual-help-body-size.description: Used by `.spectrum-ContextualHelp-popover`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-contextual-help-body-size)`, if not set.

mod-contextual-help-body-color.description: Used by `.spectrum-ContextualHelp-popover`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-body-color)`, if not set.

mod-spectrum-contextual-help-content-spa.description: Used by `.spectrum-ContextualHelp-popover .spectrum-ContextualHelp-heading`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-contextual-help-content-spacing)`, if not set.

mod-spectrum-contextual-help-heading-siz.description: Used by `.spectrum-ContextualHelp-popover .spectrum-ContextualHelp-heading`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-contextual-help-title-size)`, if not set.

mod-contextual-help-heading-color.description: Used by `.spectrum-ContextualHelp-popover .spectrum-ContextualHelp-heading`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-heading-color)`, if not set.

mod-spectrum-contextual-help-link-spacin.description: Used by `.spectrum-ContextualHelp-link`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-spacing-300)`, if not set.

highcontrast-contextual-help-body-color.description: Defined in `.spectrum-ContextualHelp`. Used by `.spectrum-ContextualHelp-popover`. Defaults to `var(--mod-contextual-help-body-color, var(--spectrum-body-color))`, if not set.

highcontrast-contextual-help-heading-col.description: Defined in `.spectrum-ContextualHelp`. Used by `.spectrum-ContextualHelp-popover .spectrum-ContextualHelp-heading`. Defaults to `var(--mod-contextual-help-heading-color, var(--spectrum-heading-color))`, if not set.
